entry.title: QR CODE FOR TAINING
entry.content:
Good morning Team,

I aim to streamline the process of recording employee training completion within our organisation. Upon finishing a training course, I intend for our team members to mark themselves as 'completed' by scanning a QR code. This QR code will be linked to our SAP or SuccessFactors system, ensuring a seamless integration and accurate tracking of training progress within our workforce. Is this possible? If so how? Also will it work I SAP 4 HANA

entry.title: Differences between SAP Enable Now Cloud Vs. On-premise licences
entry.content:
First,

I understand that Clients can buy SAP Enable Now (SEN) licences as On-premise version OR Cloud version.

  • We can purchase SEN Cloud licences from SAP Enable Now Cloud, which is a public cloud.
  • When we purchase SEN On-premise licences, they are mainly used in the private cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure, etc.). OR does the On-premise version mean they are physically installed in users' local computers?

Please confirm whether my above understanding is correct.

Next,

  • I assume that when we buy SEN On-premise licences, we buy Developer Licences and Learner Licences separately.
  • However, when we buy SEN Cloud licences, there is no categorization like Developer Licences and Learner Licences. In this case, SEN licences purchased can be used as Developer ones or Learner ones.

Please confirm whether my above understanding is correct.

entry.title: Sap on AWS
entry.content: I'm freshers i completed AWS solution architecture course and I want to shift on sap .what is a roadmap

entry.title: SAP system simulator
entry.content:
Greetings,

I have a question about the SAP system training and courses here. Is there a Simulator system so that I can practise on during my training here?

Sincerely,

Shaden

entry.title: NPL License website doesn't work atm
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using a NPL trial here for training purposes.

I tried to get a new NPL license, but the site wants credentials, rejects mine and refuses to load.

Can you please fix that? Or was that license website shut down?

This one here:

https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap

I found another message on here, written February 2020 and it seems the license server had a problem on your end.

Kind Regards

M. Kiewitz

entry.title: Scheduling Exam - Purchased Attempts
entry.content:
Hi!

I am trying to schedule an exam for C_ARSCC_2308 SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Ariba Supply Chain Collaboration.

I have purchased 6 attempts for exam. However, when I click on shedule an exam, it shows up that I do not have any exam attempt. Could you help me fix this problem?

entry.title: SAP FICO and SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I want to learn SAPFICO. In one of the training institute, they are training in SAPS/4HANA, because it is a server and SAPFICO is a module. At the end they will issue a SAP FICO completion course certificate.

I request for your suggestion.

Thank you.

entry.title: S-User ID Expiration / SAP Certifications
entry.content:
Hello. My S-User S0019675163 is expiring on 01.01.2024, which is linked to 8 SAP certifications that I have achieved.

I have linked this account to my SAP Universal ID already. Is there anything else I need to do to ensure that my certifications are not deleted? Can I transfer the certifications to my new S-User ID S0025412106?

Thank you & kind regards

Michael Janits

entry.title: Problem with SAP learning exercises
entry.content:
Hello!
I'm currently taking the course "Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA" and I was trying to open the first exercise, but it gets stuck on this loading screen.
Can anyone help me with this?

entry.title: Is there any way to import a saved R xgboost model into HANA and load it?
entry.content: If you've saved an XGBoost model locally and want to import it into HANA, you can follow these steps. Since R on HANA primarily deals with data frames, you might need to use a combination of RStudio or Python and then transfer the results to HANA.

entry.title: Curriculum for certification E_ACTCLD_23 is not fully available
entry.content:
Hi Activate colleagues,

I am willing to start my preparation for "E_ACTCLD_23 - SAP Certified Specialist - SAP Activate for Cloud Solutions Project Manager" and, while giving an initial review of the topics to be covered, I realized there is a topic "SAP Cloud Application Lifecycle Management" which receives > 12% of weight and which points to openSAP course CALM1. However, when getting to openSAP, it clearly says that this course was retired on October 2023.

Is there any replacement for this course? or are the contents already covered inside of ACT100 and ACT200?

Appreciate suggestions and advices!

Cheers.

Alejandro.

PS: just adding some SAP colleagues related to Activate, just in case any of you has the right answer. daniel.ciecko jan.musil rbyrne adnette.kamugisha danielle.beeken lbettuzzi

entry.title: Is there another option for mass final confirmation?
entry.content:
Hello,

I currently use SAP Easy Access t-code COR6N (Single Screen Entry of Confirmations) in order to do a final confirmation on process orders.

Each one of our trucks contains multiple process orders for one load. COR6N requires that I enter each Order Number plus the Order Quantity in order to confirm the order to be able to release it via QA16.

Is there any other T-code I can use to do a mass final confirmation for one load instead of a single entry for final confirmation?

entry.title: the site is still down : https://training.sap.com
entry.content:
Hi Experts , 

Do you have any idea if the site is still down : https://training.sap.com 

I couldn't access the certification Hub with my S-User , whenever I type my ID/PW I get an error saying the page is unvailable.

-Deleted cookies / Tried on several devices / several web-browsers..nothing has changed

Can you please check from your side .

Thank you

entry.title: is open.sap.com down
entry.content:
Hi!
open.sap.com seems to be offline/down...

entry.title: Five Key assessments for a Smooth ECC to S/4HANA Transformation
entry.content:
Greetings to all!           

      Embarking on the journey from an existing SAP ERP system to SAP S/4HANA can be a complex and daunting task. The transition involves assessing the current landscape, understanding the implications of the move, and preparing for the changes ahead. In the initial phase of this transformation, focusing on key strategies can help streamline the process and set the stage for a successful transition. Here, we discuss five essential assessments that organizations can do to navigate this transformation effectively, ensuring minimal disruption and maximum benefit.

Also when initiating a system conversion project, time and effort estimation are crucial to ensure the project stays on track. However, achieving accurate estimations can be challenging without data-driven actions.

To simplify this process, we can perform five key assessments:

  1. Business Transformation Assessment
  2. Landscape Assessment
  3. Process Assessment
  4. Custom Objects Assessment
  5. Timeline Assessment

Let's get started

1. Business Transformation Assessment

Without a proper understanding of the landscape and the knowledge of how each of the processes is affected, it is literally impossible to build a proper digital transformation plan.

Collect all the business processes from the legacy system and organize them hierarchically into the following levels

L1 – Line of business

L2 – Process group

L3 – Scope item

L4 – Process variant

L5 – Process step

And conduct a materiality analysis of all the Functional Modules. This will help you identify the heavily used modules and the rarely used modules in the existing landscape. The primary purpose of this analysis is to understand the AS-IS state.

2. Landscape Assessment

 2.1  Active vs Inactive Users
         Find out the total number of SAP ERP users and classify them into active and inactive users based on their activity. As a result, this section gives you an analytical view of all the users present in the system and helps you make the right decision with respect to license purchase before moving to S/4HANA.

 2.2 Add-on Analytics   

        Your transition from ECC to S/4HANA can be hindered by an incompatible add-on. All add-ons must be certified to run on S/4HANA. For SAP's own add-ons or those sold through SAP's pricelist, you can directly request the status of add-ons and additional packages from SAP. However, SAP is not responsible for independent third-party add-ons.

 2.3 Archiving List

       Archiving in SAP refers to the process of moving data that is no longer actively used or needed for daily operations to a separate storage location. This helps reduce the size of the production database, improve system performance, and ensure compliance with legal and regulatory requirements regarding data retention.

3. Process Assessment

 3.1 Enterprise Structure Mining

    Enterprise Structure Mining assessments are crucial for understanding the current organizational setup, including the number of company codes, sales organizations, purchase organizations, and other key elements. This information is used to identify opportunities for streamlining processes, improving efficiency, and aligning the SAP system with the organization's strategic objectives.

For example, in the case of Sales documents, the analysis drills down from company codes, sales organizations, distribution channels, plants, and all the way up to the sales documents.                                     

 3.2 Complexity Analysis

     Analyze the complexity of the system in terms of parameters such as the New G/L, Special Purpose Ledger, Material Ledger, Multi-Currency model, and Business Partners that are active in the existing landscape.

 

 3.3 Simplification Item Check

       Simplification analysis is a crucial step in preparing for an SAP S/4HANA conversion. It involves assessing the potential adaptation work needed to transition from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA at a functional level. This analysis helps identify simplification items, which are changes or adaptations required for business processes and custom developments to align with SAP S/4HANA's functionalities and best practices. The analysis provides insights into the impact of these changes, helping organizations plan and execute their conversion projects effectively.

 3.4  Training Plan

        In a system conversion project like transitioning to SAP S/4HANA, it's crucial to prioritize training for end-users. Often, the focus is on the technical aspects of the project, but neglecting user training can lead to challenges post-implementation. To ensure a successful transition, create a comprehensive training plan that includes scenario-based training and onboard end-users early in the process. This approach not only prepares users for the new system but also helps in embracing a mindset shift towards leveraging SAP S/4HANA for success in the digital economy.

4. Custom Objects Assessment

     In the Custom Objects Assessment, the goal is to identify all custom objects in the system. These custom objects may not be readable in the S/4HANA system, potentially requiring significant time for adaptation. By the end of this assessment, you should have the total number of custom objects, modules with a high number of custom objects, total impacted objects, and total impacted cases. This information is crucial for planning and executing the transition to SAP S/4HANA effectively.

5. Timeline/Effort Assessment

 5.1  Timeline Assessment

Timeline Assessment involves planning the project timeline based on team size, assessment results, and project scope. It includes creating a high-level roadmap for the SAP S/4HANA system conversion process, validating it with solution architects and project managers, and charting out a detailed plan for the conversion project. This step is crucial for setting realistic deadlines, milestones, and sub-phase timelines to ensure the project stays on track and is completed successfully.  

 5.2 Effort Estimation

 Effort Estimation in the context of SAP S/4HANA conversion refers to accurately predicting the resources and efforts required for the conversion project. It involves identifying the necessary preparation and pre-checks in the current system landscape, estimating HANA database and hardware sizing, and quantifying the IT effort needed for the transition. This helps in optimizing the total cost of conversion and deploying the right resources for a successful SAP S/4HANA realization.

entry.title: Free Sap certification one attempt for student
entry.content:
Hey there, SAP community!

Hope everyone's doing great.

I'm currently a student and interning as a SAP FICO consultant.

I'm eager to learn more and would love to know if there are any opportunities for students to get a free shot at SAP certification,  Could you please advise me on how to access such opportunities?

Would really appreciate any guidance you can offer.

Thanks a bunch!

entry.title: Unable to access training.sap.com
entry.content: I've been unable to access the training.sap.com website for the last couple of days. After I try to login, I'm getting an "HTTP ERROR 500". Anyone else facing this issue?

entry.title: What training tools do you use in SAP for end-users?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone 

Hope all of you are well. Just solicitating some feedback on what other companies are using for end-user training materials. I have understanding of both "walk me" and "show me", are there any other tools that you are using to help users understand new functionality, a change in process, etc..?

entry.title: Too many failed attempts on training (practice) system. Account locked - what can I do?
entry.content:
Hi friends,

 

my Account got locked on Training (practice) system, cause of too many failed attempts (i forgot the PW). What could i do to get my Training system back, or how could I unlock it? 

Thank you very much,

Andi

entry.title: Mini SAP
entry.content:
Hello, 

I need to train the basics of SAP, do primary transactions and normal stuff.

Can anyone help me, to find a SAP version that runs on a laptop. I heard about mini SAP, but I don't know where to find it, and also if it has trial period or a student license. 

Thank you in advance, for any guidance,
